signals.headline: Trump Signals Iran War 'Very Close to Over'; In-Principle Agreement to Extend Ceasefire Beyond April 22 | YES | MED conf
signals.raw:
Trump Signals Iran War 'Very Close to Over'; In-Principle Agreement to Extend Ceasefire Beyond April 22 | YES | MED confidence**[1][2][5]

US President Trump stated the war with Iran is "very close to over," citing optimism for diplomacy over military action, with a second round of talks possibly in Islamabad within two days.[1][5] Regional officials report Washington and Tehran have an "in princi
